summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 new features added to Vocabulous spaced learning app. All backend APIs working (26/26 - 100% pass rate) and frontend integration fully functional. New teacher and student features successfully implemented and tested.
passed_tests: All 26 backend API endpoints working (100% pass rate)
Teacher heatmap analytics endpoint returning student activity data
Teacher bottlenecks analytics endpoint showing struggle cards and tag retention
Student research decks endpoint returning available practice decks
Student practice cards endpoint returning all cards for research mode
Join class by code functionality with proper error handling
Card CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete) working
Blurting session creation and analysis working
Teacher Classes page showing class codes with copy functionality
Teacher deck detail page with card management (add/edit/delete)
Teacher heatmap page displaying 30-day student activity grid
Teacher bottlenecks page showing struggle cards and tag retention data
Student dashboard with join class functionality
Student Research page with deck browsing and practice mode
Student Blurting page with deck selection and text analysis
New navigation links (Research, Blurting for students; Heatmap, Bottlenecks for teachers)
Research/practice mode showing 'Next Card' button instead of grade buttons
Join class form with invalid code error handling
Class code generation and display working
Frontend-backend integration for all new features

success_percentage.backend: 100% (26/26 API endpoints working including 8 new endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All new UI components and flows working)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (Frontend-backend integration working for all new features)
success_percentage.new_features: 100% (All 4 requested features fully implemented and working)
